subject: FW: taxes
body:
Please advise

-----Original Message-----
From: Catherine Derby [mailto:catherinederby@hotmail.com] 
Sent: Friday, October 12, 2007 8:57 AM
To: Rich Kahn
Subject: RE: taxes


HI RIch,  Oh thank you so much for locating these docs!  I"m in WV for a funeral and in the sticks I do not have cell reception.  When make it to 'town' for the funeral I'll try to break away and give you a call by end of day.  If you could mail me a copy so I have them late Monday I can post mark them on time & to do my return that would help immensley!  Is there anyway you could at least email the info via email so I can input those numbers?

425 W. 45th St  Apt 1RE  NYC, 10036

THANK YOU!!
Catherine

----------------------------------------> Subject: RE: taxes> Date: Thu, 11 Oct 2007 09:50:28 -0400> From: rkahn@nysgmail.com> To: catherinederby@hotmail.com>> Please call me so we can discuss me getting you a copy of your w-2> My direct line is 212-891-6430> Thank you>> Rich>>> -----Original Message-----> From: Catherine Derby [mailto:catherinederby@hotmail.com]> Sent: Wednesday, October 10, 2007 10:28 PM> To: Rich Kahn> Subject: RE: taxes>>> Oh great! Unfortunately, coming by the office will not work this week. Can you please place them in the post so I can have them ASAP to complete my taxes. If you can't let me know because there is a supplemental tax form I'll need to get in it's place.>> Thank you so much!> Catherine>> ----------------------------------------> Subject: RE: taxes> Date: Wed, 10 Oct 2007 15:04:44 -0400> From: rkahn@nysgmail.com> To: catherinederby@hotmail.com>> The W-2 is available for you. Please come by the office whenever is> convenient for you to review / make copies of.>> Thank you>> Rich>> -----Original Message-----> From: Catherine Derby [mailto:catherinederby@hotmail.com]> Sent: Wednesday, October 10, 2007 2:34 PM> To: Rich Kahn> Subject: taxes>>> Hi Rich,> Did you receive my email re my lost 2006 w-2? It is only a couple of> weeks work at NES for '06. I called the IRS and they said I am able to> get this info from my emplouer. I'm racing against the deadline of> MOnday. If there is anyway you could email me the amount for 2006 so I> can get working on my taxes and mail me a hard copy ASAP I would greatly> appreciate it. Please let me know.>> THANK YOU!!>> Catherine> _________________________________________________________________> Peek-a-boo FREE Tricks & Treats for You!> http://www.reallivemoms.com?ocid=TXT_TAGHM&loc=us>> _________________________________________________________________> Help yourself to FREE treats served up daily at the Messenger Café. Stop by today.> http://www.cafemessenger.com/info/info_sweetstuff2.html?ocid=TXT_TAGLM_OctWLtagline

subject: FW: taxes
body:
Please advise

-----Original Message-----
From: Catherine Derby [mailto:catherinederby@hotmail.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, October 10, 2007 10:28 PM
To: Rich Kahn
Subject: RE: taxes


Oh great!  Unfortunately, coming by the office will not work this week.  Can you please place them in the post so I can have them ASAP to complete my taxes.   If you can't let me know because there is a supplemental tax form I'll need to get in it's place.

Thank you so much!
Catherine
